# LaunchDeck API

![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)
![Node](https://img.shields.io/badge/node-20%2B-brightgreen.svg)

LaunchDeck API is a small TypeScript service for publishing product launch updates.

## Installation

```bash
pnpm install
```

## Usage

```bash
pnpm test
pnpm build
```

## Demo

```text
GET /health -> 200 OK
```

## Roadmap

- Add OpenAPI documentation
- Add deployment examples
